title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Tata Housing - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Tata Housing - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Tata Housing has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Srinagar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tata Housing:
Tata Housing is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Housing!
